symbols.name: DomainPolicies
symbols.summary: Provides methods to apply domain policies asynchronously on a given context.

symbols.name: ApplyAsync(TContext, IDomainPolicy, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Applies domain policies to the given context asynchronously.

syntax.content: public static Task> ApplyAsync(TContext context, IDomainPolicy policy, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The context to which the policies are applied.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the domain policy result for the provided context.

parameters.description: The context to which the policies are applied.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the domain policy result for the provided context.

symbols.name: ApplyAsync(TContext, IDomainPolicy[], CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Applies a set of domain policies to the specified context asynchronously.

syntax.content: public static Task> ApplyAsync(TContext context, IDomainPolicy[] policies, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The context to which the domain policies will be applied.
An array of domain policies to be applied to the context.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation, containing a DomainPolicyResult object.

parameters.description: The context to which the domain policies will be applied.
An array of domain policies to be applied to the context.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation, containing a DomainPolicyResult object.
